title: Regression in t_stream_unpack_lhs
body:
This commit (https://github.com/verilator/verilator/commit/316fb02c60c543268824b2ed443fc584cb354095) introduced a bug which causes a regression test to fail (`t_stream_unpack_lhs`). Importantly Verilator shall be compiled with: 
```bash
export CC="gcc -DVL_LEAK_CHECKS"
export CXX="g++ -DVL_LEAK_CHECKS"
```

Here is a `Dockerfile` recreating the case:
```dockerfile
FROM debian:latest

WORKDIR /app

ENV CC="gcc -DVL_LEAK_CHECKS"
ENV CXX="g++ -DVL_LEAK_CHECKS"

RUN apt-get update && apt-get -y --no-install-recommends install \
      autoconf bc bison build-essential ca-certificates ccache clang \
      cmake flex gdb git gtkwave help2man libfl2 libfl-dev libclang-rt-18-dev \
      libgoogle-perftools-dev libsystemc libsystemc-dev perl wget python3-distro \
      z3 zlib1g zlib1g-dev time libssl-dev libbz2-dev libreadline-dev libsqlite3-dev \
      curl llvm libncurses5-dev libncursesw5-dev xz-utils tk-dev libffi-dev \
      liblzma-dev python3-openssl python3-venv mold python3-full python3-yaml
RUN git clone https://github.com/veripool/vcddiff.git
RUN make -C vcddiff
RUN cp -p vcddiff/vcddiff /usr/local/bin/vcddiff
RUN rm -rf vcddiff


RUN git clone https://github.com/verilator/verilator.git verilator
WORKDIR /app/verilator
RUN git checkout 316fb02c60c543268824b2ed443fc584cb354095
RUN autoconf
RUN ./configure --enable-longtests --enable-ccwarn=yes --enable-dev-asan

RUN make -j`nproc`

ENTRYPOINT [ "/app/verilator/test_regress/t/t_stream_unpack_lhs.py" ]
```
code_blocks:
export CC="gcc -DVL_LEAK_CHECKS"
export CXX="g++ -DVL_LEAK_CHECKS"
FROM debian:latest

WORKDIR /app

ENV CC="gcc -DVL_LEAK_CHECKS"
ENV CXX="g++ -DVL_LEAK_CHECKS"

RUN apt-get update && apt-get -y --no-install-recommends install \
      autoconf bc bison build-essential ca-certificates ccache clang \
      cmake flex gdb git gtkwave help2man libfl2 libfl-dev libclang-rt-18-dev \
      libgoogle-perftools-dev libsystemc libsystemc-dev perl wget python3-distro \
      z3 zlib1g zlib1g-dev time libssl-dev libbz2-dev libreadline-dev libsqlite3-dev \
      curl llvm libncurses5-dev libncursesw5-dev xz-utils tk-dev libffi-dev \
      liblzma-dev python3-openssl python3-venv mold python3-full python3-yaml
RUN git clone https://github.com/veripool/vcddiff.git
RUN make -C vcddiff
RUN cp -p vcddiff/vcddiff /usr/local/bin/vcddiff
RUN rm -rf vcddiff


RUN git clone https://github.com/verilator/verilator.git verilator
WORKDIR /app/verilator
RUN git checkout 316fb02c60c543268824b2ed443fc584cb354095
RUN autoconf
RUN ./configure --enable-longtests --enable-ccwarn=yes --enable-dev-asan

RUN make -j`nproc`

ENTRYPOINT [ "/app/verilator/test_regress/t/t_stream_unpack_lhs.py" ]
